Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

SOUTHEAST: pineapple

INSIDE: chalk
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: books
RIGHT: jacket
TOP: cat
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: plate
NORTHWEST: saucepan
NORTHEAST: horse
SOUTHWEST: mug
SOUTHEAST: pineapple
HERE: cobalt
THERE: tank top
NOWHERE: papaya
EVERYWHERE: jackfruit
INSIDE: chalk
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

RIGHT: jacket

NORTHWEST: saucepan

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: books
RIGHT: jacket
TOP: cat
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: plate
NORTHWEST: saucepan
NORTHEAST: horse
SOUTHWEST: mug
SOUTHEAST: pineapple
HERE: cobalt
THERE: tank top
NOWHERE: papaya
EVERYWHERE: jackfruit
INSIDE: chalk
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

TOP: cat

CENTER: plate

SOUTHWEST: mug

RIGHT: jacket
TOP: cat

NORTHWEST: saucepan

THERE: tank top
NOWHERE: papaya
EVERYWHERE: jackfruit
INSIDE: chalk

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

TOP: cat

NORTHWEST: saucepan

SOUTHWEST: mug
SOUTHEAST: pineapple
HERE: cobalt
THERE: tank top
NOWHERE: papaya
EVERYWHERE: jackfruit
INSIDE: chalk
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
